title: BEM-828 queue JSON safe
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:40 (UTC+3)'
invalid=[]; valid=[]
qdir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
for p in sorted(qdir.glob('*.json')):
    raw=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    ok=True
    err=''
    try:
        json.loads(raw)
    except:
        ok=False
        err='json_load_failed'
    if ok:
        valid.append(str(p))
    else:
        invalid.append({'path':str(p),'error':err,'preview':raw[:200]})
        quarantine=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')/(p.name+'.txt')
        quarantine.write_text('INVALID QUEUE JSON quarantined at '+created+sep+'Source: '+str(p)+sep+'Error: '+err+sep+sep+raw,encoding='utf-8')
        p.unlink()
fresh=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem828_claude_dispatch_valid_retry.json')
fresh.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v4','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-828 valid retry after invalid control character in queue JSON','created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False,separators=(',',':'))+sep,encoding='utf-8')
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
if proc.exists():
    txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'BEM-828 invalid json guard' not in txt:
        txt=txt.replace('for f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do\n  [ -f "$f" ] || continue', 'for f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do\n  [ -f "$f" ] || continue\n  # BEM-828 invalid json guard\n  if ! python3 -m json.tool "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then\n    base="$(basename "$f" .json)"\n    out="governance/workflow_dispatch_results/${base}.status.json"\n    printf \'{"status":"invalid_json","queue_file":"%s","time":"%s"}\\n\' "$f" "$now" > "$out"\n    mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid\n    mv "$f" "governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid/${base}.json.txt"\n    continue\n  fi')
        proc.write_text(txt)
state={'bem':'BEM-828','status':'invalid_queue_json_repaired_safe','invalid_count':len(invalid),'invalid':invalid,'valid_before':valid,'fresh_queue_item':str(fresh),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem828_repair_invalid_dispatch_queue_json_safe.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem828_repair_invalid_dispatch_queue_json_safe.md').write_text('# BEM-828 | Repair Invalid Dispatch Queue JSON Safe | REPAIRED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem828_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh Codex tick must pass Dispatch workflow queue without JSONDecodeError and create dispatch result. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-828'+sep+sep+'Invalid queue JSON repaired safely. Next: tick and verify dispatch queue no JSONDecodeError.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem828_repair_invalid_dispatch_queue_json_safe.json','governance/reports/bem828_repair_invalid_dispatch_queue_json_safe.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem828_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(fresh)])
for x in invalid:
    changed_files.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid/'+Path(x['path']).name+'.txt')
if proc.exists(): changed_files.append(str(proc))
ops_applied.append('Safely quarantined invalid workflow_dispatch_queue JSON files, created fresh compact valid Claude dispatch queue item, and hardened custom queue processor against invalid JSON')
"""
No issue comments.
